title: Combined Hepatic Clearance Stress
description: Both high-dose Neem leaf preparations and Albendazole exert severe clearance stress on hepatic metabolic pathways. Concurrent administration multiplies risks of drug-induced liver injury (DILI) and transient hepatotoxicity.
clinicalAdvice: Strictly contraindicated at the bedside. Allow a minimum of 7 days between the completion of Albendazole deworming courses and the initiation of Neem therapies.
